queue.name: button
queue.spec: Primary interactive element. Supports variants (primary, secondary, ghost, destructive), sizes (sm, md, lg), loading state, disabled state, and optional leading/trailing icons. Keyboard: Enter, Space. Role: button.

queue.name: input
queue.spec: Text input field. Supports label, helper text, error state, disabled state, leading/trailing adornments. Fully controlled and uncontrolled modes.

queue.name: modal
queue.spec: Dialog overlay using native <dialog> element. Controlled open/close. Focus trap. Backdrop click to dismiss. Keyboard: Escape to close.

queue.name: card
queue.spec: Container component. Optional header, body, footer sections. Supports hover/interactive variant.

queue.name: badge
queue.spec: Inline label for status, count, or category. Variants: default, success, warning, error, info. Sizes: sm, md.

queue.name: textarea
queue.spec: Multi-line text input. Label, hint, error state. resize prop (none/vertical/both). idle/focused/error machine like Input. A11y: role textbox, aria-multiline.

queue.name: select
queue.spec: Native <select> wrapper. Label, hint, error, placeholder, options array, size. Chevron via masked SVG. idle/focused/error machine. A11y: role combobox.

queue.name: checkbox
queue.spec: Hidden native checkbox + CSS :checked indicator. label, indeterminate (set via ref effect), disabled. A11y: role checkbox, keyboard Space.

queue.name: radio
queue.spec: Radio + RadioGroup. Hidden native radio with CSS indicator. RadioGroup drills name/checked via cloneElement (no context). A11y: role radio/radiogroup, arrow keys.

queue.name: toggle
queue.spec: Switch built as <button role=switch>. Controlled + uncontrolled (on/off machine). Sliding thumb via translate. Sizes sm/md. A11y: aria-checked, keyboard Space.

queue.name: slider
queue.spec: Native <input type=range> with custom track/thumb styling under @supports. Label, min/max/step. A11y: role slider, arrow keys, Home/End.

queue.name: tooltip
queue.spec: CSS-positioned tooltip shown on hover/focus. hidden/visible machine, configurable delay. @starting-style enter animation. A11y: role tooltip, aria-describedby on trigger.

queue.name: dropdown
queue.spec: Menu from a trigger. closed/open machine, controlled override. Full keyboard nav (arrows/Home/End/Enter/Escape), roving tabindex, outside-click dismiss. A11y: role menu/menuitem.

queue.name: toast
queue.spec: ToastProvider + useToast hook. Signal-backed queue, max 3 visible, auto-dismiss. Per-toast entering/visible/dismissing/gone machine. A11y: aria-live polite (assertive for destructive).

queue.name: alert
queue.spec: Inline message. Variants default/info/success/warning/destructive, optional icon, title, dismissible. A11y: role alert for urgent, role status otherwise.

queue.name: avatar
queue.spec: User image with initials fallback via loading/loaded/error machine driven by img onLoad/onError. Sizes xs-xl, optional status dot. A11y: img alt / aria-label fallback.

queue.name: separator
queue.spec: Divider. <hr> for horizontal, <div role=separator> for vertical. decorative prop hides from a11y. Logical-property borders.

queue.name: tabs
queue.spec: Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent. Shared signal store via createContext + use(). Roving arrow-key nav, Home/End. A11y: role tablist/tab/tabpanel, aria-selected/controls/labelledby.

queue.name: accordion
queue.spec: Accordion/AccordionItem/AccordionTrigger/AccordionContent. single/multiple modes, signal store via createContext + use(). grid-template-rows 0fr->1fr animation. A11y: aria-expanded/controls.

queue.name: spinner
queue.spec: Pure-CSS rotating border indicator. Sizes sm/md/lg, screen-reader label. Shared by Button's loading state. A11y: role status, aria-label.

queue.name: kbd
queue.spec: Keyboard key indicator. Renders a <kbd> element styled like a physical key (subtle border, inset shadow, mono font). Props: size (sm | md). Pure display — no machine, no signals, no interactive state. A11y: native <kbd> semantics, no extra role.

queue.name: link
queue.spec: Styled anchor. Variants: standalone (default) and inline (for use within prose). Optional external prop adds target=_blank, rel=noreferrer and a visual external indicator via CSS. Extends AnchorHTMLAttributes. Pure display - no machine, no signals.

queue.name: breadcrumb
queue.spec: Breadcrumb trail. Props: items {label, href?}[], maxVisible? (collapses middle items to an ellipsis when exceeded). Renders nav[aria-label=Breadcrumb] > ol > li with separators via CSS pseudo-elements (logical properties). Last item gets aria-current=page and renders as text.

queue.name: header
queue.spec: App top bar (UI shell header). Props: brand (ReactNode), links {label, href, active?}[], actions slot (ReactNode), sticky?. role=banner, nav landmark for links. Container-query responsive: link labels collapse at narrow widths.

queue.name: side-nav
queue.spec: Collapsible sidebar navigation. Props: items NavItem[] ({label, href?, icon?, active?, items? one nesting level}), collapsed (controlled) / defaultCollapsed, onCollapsedChange, ariaLabel. Group expansion is genuine internal state (signal). Rail mode when collapsed shows icons only. Group expand/collapse animates via the grid-template-rows 0fr/1fr trick with motion tokens.

queue.name: pagination
queue.spec: Pagination bar. Props: page, pageSize, totalItems, onPageChange, onPageSizeChange?, pageSizeOptions?, labels? (English defaults, all overridable). Renders item-range text, page-size native select, page jumper select, prev/next buttons. nav[aria-label=Pagination], buttons disabled at bounds.

queue.name: progress-indicator
queue.spec: Multi-step progress for wizards. Props: steps {label, description?}[], currentIndex, vertical?. Step states complete/current/incomplete derived from currentIndex (no machine). ol with aria-current=step on the current item; check glyph on completed steps.

queue.name: tag
queue.spec: Compact label chip. Variants: default, info, success, warning, error. Sizes: sm, md. Optional onDismiss renders an accessible close button. Pure display.

queue.name: skeleton
queue.spec: Loading placeholder. Variants: text (lines prop), circle, rect; width/height props. Continuous shimmer animation with literal duration plus prefers-reduced-motion static fallback (like Spinner). aria-hidden - screen readers see nothing.

queue.name: progress-bar
queue.spec: Linear progress. Props: value 0-100 or indeterminate, label?, helperText?, size sm/md, status active/success/error. role=progressbar with aria-valuenow/min/max (omitted when indeterminate). Indeterminate sweep uses a literal duration + reduced-motion fallback.

queue.name: empty-state
queue.spec: Empty/zero-data placeholder. Props: icon? (ReactNode), title, description?, action? (ReactNode), size md/lg. Centered column layout. Pure display.

queue.name: overflow-menu
queue.spec: Kebab icon-button menu for row/card actions. Composes the existing Dropdown menu mechanics with a built-in icon trigger. Props: items (same shape as Dropdown), onSelect, placement bottom-start/bottom-end, ariaLabel (default More actions), size sm/md. Menu open/close animated with motion tokens + @starting-style.

queue.name: search
queue.spec: Search input. Props: value/defaultValue, onChange, onSearch (debounced, debounceMs default 300), placeholder, size, label?. input[type=search] with leading search glyph and a clear button that appears via CSS :has/value tracking; clear restores focus and fires onSearch with empty string.

queue.name: data-table
queue.spec: Flagship generic table: one component, one typed props object. DataTable<Row> with columns Column<Row>[] ({key, header, sortable?, render?, align?, width?}), rows, getRowId?. Built-in prop-toggled: sorting (client or sortMode=server emitting onSortChange), global search toolbar (searchable), client pagination ({pageSize, pageSizeOptions}), selection ({mode single/multi, onChange}) with batch-action toolbar, expandable rows (renderExpandedRow), density compact/normal/relaxed, zebra, stickyHeader, loading skeleton rows, emptyState. Rows get content-visibility:auto + contain-intrinsic-size for large data; sorting/filtering/pagination computed with signals (zero re-render interactions). A11y: aria-sort, full keyboard support, selection announcements.

queue.name: combobox
queue.spec: Filterable select. Props: options {value,label,disabled?}[], value/onChange (string or string[] with multiple), multiple?, label/hint/error like Select, placeholder, loading? (async options driven by onInputChange), renderOption?. Input + popover listbox, built-in filtering, multi mode renders inline dismissible tags. Machine closed/open driven by component. A11y: role=combobox, aria-expanded, aria-activedescendant, full arrow/Enter/Escape keyboard support. Listbox animated with motion tokens. NOTE: build on the dropdown open/close machine + positioning pattern and the select field styling; listbox animated with @starting-style; strings via builtin catalog (combobox namespace, en+de).

queue.name: number-input
queue.spec: Numeric input with steppers. Props: value/defaultValue, onChange(number|null), min/max/step, precision?, formatOptions? (Intl.NumberFormat applied on blur, raw while editing), label/hint/error, size, disabled. inputmode=numeric, stepper buttons respect bounds, ArrowUp/ArrowDown step. idle/focused/error machine like Input.

queue.name: time-picker
queue.spec: Time input. Wraps native input[type=time] with cascade field styling: label/hint/error, size, min/max/step. idle/focused/error machine like Input. Native semantics give a11y and locale handling for free. NOTE: time-picker.tsx already exists and is close to spec — complete the missing .module.css/.meta.ts/.test.tsx around it; refine the tsx only where the spec or rules demand (strings → builtin catalog).

queue.name: date-picker
queue.spec: Date selection with from-scratch calendar grid. Props: mode single/range, value/onChange (Date or {start,end}), min/max, locale? (defaults to browser), label/hint/error, disabled. Read-only input(s) showing Intl.DateTimeFormat-formatted value; popover calendar with month navigation, weekday headers via Intl, today marker. Keyboard: roving tabindex on grid, arrows move focus, Enter selects, Escape closes. A11y: trigger aria-haspopup=dialog, grid role=grid, selected aria-selected. Popover animated with motion tokens + @starting-style. NOTE: calendar math from scratch — month grid via Date arithmetic (UTC-safe; first weekday from Intl.Locale weekInfo when available, fallback Monday), weekday/month names via Intl.DateTimeFormat with the i18n active locale (currentLocale()), roving tabindex grid. TimePicker ships separately (priority 36). All visible strings via builtin catalog (datePicker namespace, en+de).

queue.name: file-uploader
queue.spec: Drag-and-drop file input. Props: files UploaderFile[] ({id,name,size,status uploading/complete/error,errorMessage?}), onFilesAdded(File[]), onRemove(id), multiple?, accept?, maxSize? (oversize files surface as error status via onFilesAdded contract), label/hint, disabled. Hidden input[type=file] + drop zone; drag-over visual state via signal; file list with per-status icon/spinner and remove buttons. A11y: zone is a labelled button, list announces status. NOTE: file-uploader.tsx already exists and is close to spec — complete the missing .module.css/.meta.ts/.test.tsx around it; refine the tsx only where the spec or rules demand (strings → builtin catalog; UploaderFileStatus strings uploading/complete/error need builtin keys en+de).

queue.name: form
queue.spec: Typed form helper over signals - no react-hook-form, no useState. createForm<T>({initialValues, validate?}) and useForm wrapper returning {values, errors, touched (signals), field(name) -> {value,onChange,onBlur,error} wiring for cascade inputs, handleSubmit(onValid), reset, setValue}. Validation sync or async per submit/blur; zod-compatible via plain validate fn returning partial error map. Plus a thin <Form> element wrapping native <form> with onSubmit prevention wired.

queue.name: command-menu
queue.spec: cmd-k command palette. Props: open/onOpenChange (controlled), groups {heading?, items {id,label,icon?,shortcut?,keywords?,onSelect}[]}[], placeholder, emptyText, hotkey? (default true: global Cmd/Ctrl-K listener via useSignalEffect). Native dialog, animated with motion tokens + @starting-style. Own fuzzy subsequence matcher (no dependency). Query/active-index are signals - typing patches the list without re-rendering the container. A11y: combobox/listbox pattern, aria-activedescendant, arrows/Enter/Escape; Kbd component renders shortcuts.

queue.name: password-input
queue.spec: PasswordInput — Input variant with reveal toggle. Props: all standard input HTML attrs + showStrengthMeter?: boolean. Internal signal tracks revealed/hidden. Reveal button: aria-label from builtin.passwordInput.reveal/hide (add these keys to packages/i18n/src/builtin.ts). When revealed: type='text'; when hidden: type='password'. Strength meter (optional): measures password entropy via character-class count — renders 4 colored segments in a div, aria-label='Password strength: {weak|fair|good|strong}' (use i18n). Signal: isRevealed = useSignal(false). data-revealed attribute drives CSS. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: multi-select
queue.spec: MultiSelect — select allowing multiple values. Import usePopover from '../popover/use-popover'. Props: options: {label: string, value: string, disabled?: boolean}[], value: string[], onValueChange: (v: string[]) => void, placeholder?: string, disabled?: boolean. Trigger button shows count of selected items or placeholder. Panel (popover='auto'): searchable list — input[type=search] at top filters options via useComputed. Each option is a div with role='option' aria-selected. Keyboard: arrow keys move focus (useSignalEffect on keydown), Space/Enter toggles. anchorName and positionAnchor from usePopover. i18n: add builtin.multiSelect.placeholder/selected/search/noResults to builtin.ts. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: tags-input
queue.spec: TagsInput — free-form multi-value chip input. Props: value: string[], onValueChange: (v: string[]) => void, placeholder?: string, validate?: (tag: string) => boolean, max?: number, disabled?: boolean. Renders chips for each value + a text input at end. Enter or comma adds tag (trim, validate, deduplicate); Backspace on empty input removes last tag. Chip has dismiss button (aria-label: t(builtin.tagsInput.remove)). Signal: inputValue = useSignal(''). Chip data-state='invalid' if validate returns false. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: otp-input
queue.spec: OtpInput — segmented one-time code input. Props: length?: number (default 6), value: string, onValueChange: (v: string) => void, disabled?: boolean, type?: 'numeric'|'alphanumeric'. Renders `length` individual input elements in a flex row. Auto-advance on each digit entry. Paste distributes across segments. Backspace clears current slot and focuses previous. autocomplete='one-time-code' on first segment. Use an array signal (useSignal<string[]>) for slot values. Keyboard: ArrowLeft/Right navigate between slots. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: segmented-control
queue.spec: SegmentedControl — mutually exclusive toggle group. Props: options: {label: string, value: string, disabled?: boolean}[], value: string, onValueChange: (v: string) => void, size?: 'sm'|'md'|'lg', disabled?: boolean. Renders a div[role='group'] with button[role='radio'] for each option. No internal state machine — purely controlled. CSS: data-selected attribute on the active button drives styling. Keyboard: ArrowLeft/Right cycle through options. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: input-group
queue.spec: InputGroup — prefix/suffix addon wrapper for Input. Props: children (Input as required child), prefix?: ReactNode, suffix?: ReactNode. Renders prefix + children + suffix in a flex row. CSS: border-collapse via negative margin or border-radius 0 on adjacent sides — use logical properties (border-start-end-radius, border-end-start-radius) for RTL safety. Also exports ButtonGroup: a div wrapping multiple Buttons with collapsed internal borders. Both are layout-only with no signals needed. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: rating-group
queue.spec: RatingGroup — star rating input. Props: value: number, onValueChange: (v: number) => void, max?: number (default 5), size?: 'sm'|'md'|'lg', disabled?: boolean, readOnly?: boolean, labels?: { rating: (v: number, max: number) => string }. Renders `max` button elements each with role='radio' and aria-label='{n} of {max} stars'. Hover preview via CSS :hover ~ * sibling selector (no JS hover tracking). data-filled attribute on each star drives fill state. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: editable
queue.spec: Editable — inline click-to-edit text. Props: value: string, onValueChange: (v: string) => void, placeholder?: string, disabled?: boolean, submitOnBlur?: boolean (default true), onCancel?: () => void. Two states driven by signals: isEditing=useSignal(false), editValue=useSignal(value). Preview state: shows text + pencil icon on :hover. Click activates: set isEditing=true, useSignalEffect focuses the input. Input shown when isEditing=true. Confirm: Enter key or blur (if submitOnBlur) calls onValueChange(editValue.value) + isEditing=false. Cancel: Escape resets editValue to value + isEditing=false. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: icon-button
queue.spec: IconButton — square icon-only button. Props: icon: ReactNode, label: string (aria-label + tooltip text), size?: 'sm'|'md'|'lg', variant?: 'ghost'|'outline'|'filled', disabled?: boolean, onClick?: () => void. Renders button with aria-label=label. No signals needed — purely structural. Sizes use --cascade-control-height-sm/md/lg tokens. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: code-snippet
queue.spec: CodeSnippet — code display block. Variants: 'inline' (span), 'single-line' (pre, horizontal scroll), 'multi-line' (pre, optional line numbers). Props: code: string, variant?: 'inline'|'single'|'multi', showLineNumbers?: boolean, showCopyButton?: boolean. Uses CopyButton internally when showCopyButton. data-language attribute for styling (no syntax highlighting). No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: notification
queue.spec: Notification — inline alert/banner. Props: title: string, description?: string, variant?: 'info'|'success'|'warning'|'error', onDismiss?: () => void, icon?: ReactNode. role='alert' for error/warning, role='status' for info/success. Dismiss button with aria-label from builtin.notification.dismiss. No signals, no useState/useEffect.

queue.name: structured-list
queue.spec: StructuredList — lightweight list of rows. Props: items: {id: string, cells: ReactNode[], selected?: boolean}[], headers?: ReactNode[], selectable?: boolean, onSelect?: (id: string) => void. Renders as semantic list (ul/li). Selectable rows: role='button', Enter/Space calls onSelect. CSS: hover via :hover, selected via data-selected. No signals needed. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: tile
queue.spec: Tile — selectable card choice. Props: value: string, selected: boolean, onSelect: (v: string) => void, children: ReactNode, selectable?: 'single'|'multi', disabled?: boolean, icon?: ReactNode. role='radio' for single, role='checkbox' for multi. data-selected drives CSS. Keyboard: Space/Enter toggle. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: scroll-area
queue.spec: ScrollArea — styled scrollbars. Props: children: ReactNode, height?: string, width?: string, orientation?: 'vertical'|'horizontal'|'both'. CSS: scrollbar-width: thin + scrollbar-color for modern browsers; ::-webkit-scrollbar for WebKit. Optional scroll shadows: useSignalEffect subscribes to scroll events and sets data-scroll-start/end attributes on the container that CSS reads for shadow gradients. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: calendar
queue.spec: Calendar — standalone month-grid date picker. Props: value?: Date | null, onValueChange: (v: Date) => void, defaultValue?: Date, min?: Date, max?: Date, disabled?: (date: Date) => boolean, locale?: string, size?: 'sm'|'md'|'lg'. Signals: viewMonth=useSignal, viewYear=useSignal, focusedDate=useSignal (roving tabindex). Month grid computed from viewMonth/viewYear with UTC-safe Date arithmetic. First-day-of-week per locale via Intl.Locale weekInfo (fallback Monday). Weekday headers and month/year label via Intl.DateTimeFormat with currentLocale() from @cascade-ui/i18n. ARIA APG grid pattern: role=grid on table, role=row on tr, role=gridcell on each day button; roving tabindex — only focused day gets tabIndex=0. Keyboard: ArrowLeft/Right move one day, ArrowUp/Down move one week, Home/End jump to start/end of week, PageUp/PageDown move one month, Shift+PageUp/Down move one year, Enter/Space select. Disabled and out-of-range dates get aria-disabled=true and are skipped by keyboard nav. Today gets data-today, selected gets aria-selected + data-selected, disabled gets data-disabled. CSS tokens: --cascade-calendar-cell-size, --cascade-calendar-cell-radius, --cascade-calendar-today-color, --cascade-calendar-selected-bg, --cascade-calendar-range-bg, --cascade-calendar-disabled-opacity. i18n: add builtin.calendar.prevMonth, nextMonth, today (en+de) to packages/i18n/src/builtin.ts. Sizes sm/md/lg scale cell size. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: date-range-picker
queue.spec: DateRangePicker — dual-calendar date-range selection. Props: value?: {start: Date, end: Date} | null, onValueChange: (range: {start: Date, end: Date}) => void, defaultValue?, min?: Date, max?: Date, disabled?: (date: Date) => boolean, presets?: {label: string, range: {start: Date, end: Date}}[], locale?: string, placeholder?: string, label?, hint?, error?, size?: 'sm'|'md'|'lg'. Signals: open=useSignal(false), hoverDate=useSignal<Date|null> (hover preview), pendingStart=useSignal<Date|null> (first click awaiting second), internalRange=useSignal<{start,end}|null>. Selection state machine (signal-driven, no machine object — purely controlled transitions): on first date click set pendingStart; on second click emit range sorted start≤end; clicking the same date twice clears the selection (pendingStart and internalRange both reset). Hover preview: while pendingStart is set and hoverDate is non-null, highlight the in-between cells via data-in-range attribute computed per cell; uses the Calendar component's range token set (--cascade-calendar-range-bg). Renders a text-input trigger (two date values joined by an arrow, or placeholder) that opens a popover (popover='auto') containing two Calendar instances side-by-side (left shows month M, right shows M+1; prev/next on either advances both). Anchor + position via CSS anchor-positioning (anchorName on trigger, positionAnchor on popover, inset-block-start: anchor(block-end)). Presets slot: vertical list of buttons on the popover's leading edge; clicking a preset emits immediately, closes the popover, and highlights the preset label while its range is active. Keyboard: Tab moves through trigger → preset buttons → left calendar → right calendar → confirm button; Escape closes without committing; Enter on a day completes selection when pendingStart is set; all Calendar APG keyboard rules apply within each calendar grid. Controlled + uncontrolled modes (prop wins when provided). i18n: add builtin.dateRangePicker.placeholder, startDate, endDate, presetToday, presetLast7, presetLast30, presetCustom, apply, clear (en+de) to packages/i18n/src/builtin.ts. CSS tokens: extends calendar tokens; adds --cascade-drp-preset-width. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: tree-view
queue.spec: TreeView — hierarchical tree list following WAI-ARIA APG TreeView pattern. Props: items: TreeNode[] ({id: string, label: string, icon?: ReactNode, children?: TreeNode[], loadChildren?: () => Promise<TreeNode[]>}), selected?: string | string[] (controlled), defaultSelected?, onSelectChange?: (ids: string[]) => void, selectionMode?: 'single'|'multi', expanded?: string[] (controlled), defaultExpanded?, onExpandedChange?: (ids: string[]) => void. Signals: expandedIds=useSignal<Set<string>>, selectedIds=useSignal<Set<string>>, focusedId=useSignal<string|null>, loadingIds=useSignal<Set<string>>. Lazy loading: when a node with loadChildren is expanded and has no children yet, call loadChildren(), add to loadingIds while pending, merge returned nodes into a localNodes signal. Expand/collapse animates via grid-template-rows 0fr→1fr with motion tokens and @starting-style; prefers-reduced-motion fallback skips animation. Content-visibility: auto + contain-intrinsic-size on each subtree ul for large trees. WAI-ARIA: role=tree on root ul, role=treeitem on each li, aria-expanded on branch items, aria-selected on items, aria-level (computed from depth), aria-setsize/aria-posinset. Roving tabindex: only focusedId node gets tabIndex=0; others tabIndex=-1. Keyboard per APG: ArrowDown moves to next visible node, ArrowUp to previous, ArrowRight on collapsed branch expands it, ArrowRight on expanded branch moves focus to first child, ArrowLeft on expanded branch collapses it, ArrowLeft on collapsed branch or leaf moves to parent, Home focuses first node, End focuses last visible node, Enter/Space selects (multi: toggles, single: selects). Typeahead: printable character moves focus to next node whose label starts with that character (case-insensitive). Icon slot via @cascade-ui/icons (optional, any ReactNode). CSS tokens: --cascade-tree-indent (default 1.25rem per level), --cascade-tree-expand-icon-size, --cascade-tree-item-height, --cascade-tree-selected-bg, --cascade-tree-focus-outline. i18n: add builtin.treeView.loading, collapse, expand (en+de). No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: color-picker
queue.spec: ColorPicker — oklch-first color selection widget. Props: value: string (canonical oklch(L C H / A) or hex), onValueChange: (v: string) => void, defaultValue?, presets?: string[] (configurable swatch row), format?: 'oklch'|'hex'|'hsl' (display format, default oklch), alpha?: boolean (show alpha slider, default true), label?, hint?, error?, disabled?, size?: 'sm'|'md'. Signals: internalOklch=useSignal({l,c,h,a}) (always store in oklch; convert on output), activeFormat=useSignal(format ?? 'oklch'). Interactive gradient area: a CSS-painted canvas-like div (background: CSS gradient combining lightness×chroma axes) with pointer drag via useSignalEffect on pointermove/pointerup; pointer position maps to L (y-axis, 0–1) and C (x-axis, 0–0.4). Hue slider: input[type=range] 0–360, aria-label from builtin.colorPicker.hue. Alpha slider (when alpha=true): input[type=range] 0–1 step 0.01, aria-label from builtin.colorPicker.alpha. Chroma/lightness picker area: aria-label from builtin.colorPicker.colorArea, keyboard arrow keys nudge L/C by 0.01. Swatches row: each swatch is a button with aria-label=hex value, ArrowLeft/Right cycle focus. Text input: shows value in activeFormat; format toggle button cycles oklch→hex→hsl; input validated on blur, invalid input resets to previous value. Eyedropper: renders an EyeDropper button when window.EyeDropper is defined (wraps native EyeDropper API), graceful no-op otherwise; aria-label from builtin.colorPicker.eyedropper. Conversion utilities (oklch↔hex↔hsl, pure functions, no dependency): implement from-scratch using standard formulas (oklch→linear-sRGB→sRGB→hex). CSS tokens: --cascade-color-picker-area-size, --cascade-color-picker-slider-thumb-size, --cascade-color-picker-swatch-size. i18n: add builtin.colorPicker.hue, alpha, colorArea, eyedropper, formatToggle, presets (en+de) to packages/i18n/src/builtin.ts. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: carousel
queue.spec: Carousel — slide deck. Props: children (slides), index/onIndexChange (controlled) or defaultIndex, loop?, autoplay? (interval ms; pauses on hover/focus and never starts under prefers-reduced-motion), labels?. CSS scroll-snap track — no transform math; prev/next buttons plus dot indicators; the active index is a signal synced from scroll events via useSignalEffect. Keyboard: buttons natively tabbable, ArrowLeft/Right on the dot group. A11y: section with aria-roledescription=carousel, each slide aria-roledescription=slide and aria-label 'n of total'; control strings via builtin catalog (carousel namespace, en+de). No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: timeline
queue.spec: Timeline — ordered event display. Props: items {id, title, description?, time?, icon?, status? 'complete'|'current'|'upcoming'}[], orientation? vertical (default) / horizontal. Renders ol > li with <time> for timestamps; the connector line and markers are CSS pseudo-elements built with logical properties; status drives marker color via data-status and semantic tokens. Pure display — no machine, no signals, no keyboard handling beyond native list semantics. A11y: native ordered-list semantics, aria-current=step on the current item. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: data-list
queue.spec: DataList — key-value pairs. Props: items {id?, label: ReactNode, value: ReactNode}[], orientation? 'horizontal'|'vertical', dividers?, size? sm/md. Renders dl with dt/dd pairs; horizontal mode is a two-column grid (logical properties), vertical stacks label above value; dividers render via border-block-end on each row. Pure display — no machine, no signals. A11y: native dl/dt/dd semantics, no extra role. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: collapsible
queue.spec: Collapsible — single disclosure region. Props: open (controlled) / defaultOpen, onOpenChange, trigger (ReactNode rendered inside the built-in button), disabled, children. Uncontrolled mode runs a genuine open/closed machine driven by the trigger; controlled mode syncs the prop into the signal during render. Content animates via grid-template-rows 0fr→1fr with motion tokens, @starting-style enter, and a prefers-reduced-motion fallback; data-state open/closed drives CSS. A11y: trigger is a button with aria-expanded + aria-controls; keyboard Enter/Space. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: code-block
queue.spec: CodeBlock — multi-line code display with lightweight syntax highlighting. Props: code, language? ('ts'|'tsx'|'js'|'css'|'html'|'json'|'bash'), showLineNumbers?, wrap?, title?, copyable? (composes the existing CopyButton). Own small regex tokenizer (comments, strings, keywords, numbers) — no highlighter dependency; token colors come from semantic tokens so all five themes keep contrast. Pure display beyond the composed CopyButton. A11y: pre/code semantics, region labelled by title, horizontal scroll instead of truncation. Distinct from code-snippet (priority 52), which has no highlighting. No useState/useEffect.

queue.name: splitter
queue.spec: Splitter — two resizable panes. Props: children (exactly two panes), orientation? 'horizontal'|'vertical', defaultRatio? (0–1), minRatio?/maxRatio?, onRatioChange?, storageKey? (persists the ratio via @cascade-ui/storage). The ratio is a signal; pointer drag tracking attaches listeners via useSignalEffect. A11y: the divider is role=separator with aria-orientation and aria-valuenow/min/max. Keyboard: ArrowLeft/Right (ArrowUp/Down when vertical) nudge the ratio, Home/End snap to min/max. No useState/useEffect.
